name: Subscription Tracker
description: Track all subscriptions and find savings opportunities

agents.name: Subscription Analyst
agents.system_prompt_hint: Catalog all subscriptions with: name, cost, billing cycle, and usage estimate. Calculate total monthly and annual spend. Identify overlapping services, underused subscriptions, and available cheaper alternatives.

agents.name: Savings Advisor
agents.system_prompt_hint: Create a subscription audit report with: complete subscription inventory, total monthly/annual costs, underused subscriptions to cancel, services to downgrade, cheaper alternatives, annual vs monthly savings opportunities, and projected annual savings.

author: agentfactory
